name: tauri_cmd_reset_codex_config_handler
notes: Command string: reset_codex_config (0x141268d0a). Module: manager (0x141269224). Sets up command descriptor, calls IPC resolver.

name: sub_1400DA320
notes: SIMD hashmap probe for async pending state. WakeByAddressSingle protocol. Returns pending item ptr or 0.

name: sub_1411CE640
notes: Tauri IPC command dispatch. Resolves command handler via vtable. Sets result tag byte. Returns via resolver.

name: sub_140062230
notes: InvokeResolver dispatcher. _InterlockedCompareExchange8 lock. Calls handler via vtable[24]. WakeByAddressSingle on completion. _InterlockedDecrement64 for refcount.

name: relay_manager_reset_codex_config_impl
notes: Core impl in codexmate_lib::core::relay::manager. Two branches: (1) router active: remove catalog + strip config. (2) router inactive: strip config only.

name: relay_remove_codex_router_catalog
notes: Removes relay entry from codex_router_catalog.json. Calls relay_codex_catalog_encode_write then relay_atomic_write_file.

name: relay_codex_catalog_encode_write
notes: codexmate_lib::core::relay::codex_catalog. Reads current catalog, removes slug entry, re-encodes JSON. Calls relay_atomic_write_file.

name: relay_atomic_write_file
notes: codexmate_lib::core::relay::atomic_write. CreateFile+WriteFile to temp, MoveFileExW(flags=9=REPLACE+WRITE_THROUGH). Retry up to 9x on ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED with 500ms sleep. Win32 fs leaf.

name: relay_codex_config_toml_write
notes: Strips relay-managed blocks and provider/profile/catalog/base_url keys from config.toml. Line-by-line parser with SIMD sentinel matching.

name: relay_atomic_write_file
notes: Same atomic write leaf as above. Called if content changed (memcmp guard). Win32 MoveFileExW.
